name: UBA : Executive only asset accessed by non-executive user from external network
notes:
Detects when a non-executive user from external network logs on to an asset that is for executive use.
Two empty reference sets will be imported with this rule : "UBA : Executive Users" and "UBA : Executive Assets". Edit the reference sets to add or remove any accounts and IP addresses that are flagged from your environment. Enable this rule after configuring the reference sets.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000830) Success Audit: An account was successfully logged on
when any of Username are contained in any of (Shared) UBA : Executive Users - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when any of Destination IP are contained in any of (Shared) UBA : Executive Assets - IP
when any of Logon Type (custom) match 10
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Executive only asset accessed by non-executive user from external network on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000830) Success Audit: An account was successfully logged on
AND NOT when any of Username are contained in any of (Shared) UBA : Executive Users - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND when any of Destination IP are contained in any of (Shared) UBA : Executive Assets - IP
AND when any of Logon Type (custom) match 10
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Executive only asset accessed by non-executive user from external network
